FR-001.title: Viewer state carries structured capability content (name, purpose, requirement rows) parsed extension-side

FR-006.title: Injection-safe text nodes; token-driven theme-safe styling

FR-007.title: Stories cover rich/sparse/unavailable; parsing + derivation unit-tested

FR-008.title: Committed demo fixture exercises the card without enabling living specs in this repo
